swarmdesk.movementDescription: Adjust camera movement speeds for Orbital and FPS modes in SwarmDesk 3D environment.

messaging.title: Message Roles Configuration
messaging.subtitle: Configure which roles are allowed in chat messages. Core roles can be hidden but not deleted (they remain valid for backend validation).
messaging.infoMessage: These roles will be available when creating chat messages. Each role can have a custom emoji for visual identification. Core roles can be hidden but not deleted (they remain valid for backend validation).
messaging.emojiHelper: Single emoji character for visual identification
messaging.npcCountHelper: Choose how many clones of this role should appear in SwarmDesk (0-5).
messaging.npcColorHelper: Used for the NPC body glow and sidebar identity color.
messaging.npcRoleHelper: Shown above the NPC in SwarmDesk. Leave blank to use the display label.
messaging.npcPersonalityHelper: Controls the default vibe and fallback dialogue for this NPC.
messaging.duplicateRoleId: A role with this ID already exists.
messaging.duplicateAgentId: An agent with this ID already exists.

instructions.title: How to use:
instructions.step1: Install the UML generator: npm install -g @madnessengineering/uml-generator
instructions.step2: Generate UML from your codebase: uml-generator /path/to/project -o project-uml.json
instructions.step3: Upload the generated JSON file using the button above

complete.message: Account setup is complete. You may now access your dashboard.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.description: Inventorium is your AI-powered task management and project visualization platform.
welcome.subtitle: Let's take a quick tour to help you get started.

projects-overview.title: Projects
projects-overview.description: Organize your todos into projects for better management and visualization.
projects-overview.hint: 💡 Tip: Every todo can belong to a project

create-project.title: Create Your First Project
create-project.description: Let's create a project to organize your work. Projects help you group related todos together.
create-project.step1: Click the floating '+' button in the bottom right corner
create-project.step2: Select the 'Project' tab in the dialog
create-project.step3: Enter a unique project name (lowercase with hyphens, e.g., 'my-first-project')
create-project.step4: Add a display name and description
create-project.hint: Tip: Project names must be unique and use lowercase letters with hyphens

add-todo.title: Add Todo to Your Project
add-todo.description: Now let's add a todo to your project. Todos are the tasks and action items you need to complete.
add-todo.step2: Select the 'Todo' tab in the dialog
add-todo.step4: Select your project from the dropdown
add-todo.hint: Tip: You can create todos from anywhere in the app using the '+' button

configure-ai.title: Configure Your AI Assistant
configure-ai.description: Get the most out of Inventorium by connecting to an AI provider like Google Gemini or OpenAI.

benefits.enhance: Enhance todo descriptions with AI insights

configure-ai.statusConfigured: Status: ✅ AI is configured and ready to use!
configure-ai.statusNotConfigured: Status: ❌ AI is not configured yet
configure-ai.helpText: You can configure AI anytime from Settings → AI Configuration

ai-assistant.title: AI Assistant
ai-assistant.description: Get help from your AI assistant to manage tasks, analyze projects, and boost productivity.
ai-assistant.hint: 💡 Tip: Click the chat icon to start a conversation

swarmdesk.title: 3D Workspace
swarmdesk.description: Explore your codebase in 3D with SwarmDesk - an immersive visualization tool.
swarmdesk.hint: 💡 Tip: Access SwarmDesk from the project view
swarmdesk.tabTip: After SwarmDesk loads, press TAB to jump back and forth between the dashboard and 3D workspace

complete.title: You're All Set!
complete.description: You're ready to start using Inventorium. Explore the features and make it your own.
complete.footer: 💡 You can replay this tutorial anytime from Settings
